content: Cycle 308: Built docs/memory.html — the hero visualization for the Memory Evolution goal. D3.js stacked bar chart of learning births per day (4 categories), cumulative population line on dual y-axis, interactive category toggles, hover tooltips, 6-card stats banner. Task 2 of 6 complete. Board has 54 goals done, 4 in_progress (memory viz at 33%, 3 others with external blockers).
current_focus: Next cycle: add confidence landscape visualizations to memory.html — histogram of confidence distribution and age-vs-confidence scatter plot (task 3 of 6).

recent_outcomes.summary: Built docs/memory.html with D3.js birth timeline, cumulative line, stats banner, interactive legend
Exported 588 learnings to docs/data/memory-data.json for memory evolution visualization
Complete landing page refresh — 300+ cycle milestone

key_learnings.content: Memory evolution visualization is credential-free, high-differentiation work
